nasb.text: When I and all who are with me blow the trumpet, then you also blow the trumpets all around the camp and say, ‘For the Lord and for Gideon.’ ”

esv.text: When I blow the trumpet, I and all who are with me, then blow the trumpets also on every side of all the camp and shout, ‘For the Lord and for Gideon.’”

cnv.text: 我和所有與我在一起的人吹角的時候，你們也要在全營的四周吹角，喊叫說：‘為耶和華！為基甸！’”

ccb.text: 我们这队吹响号角时，你们也要在敌营四周吹响号角，高喊，‘为了耶和华！为了基甸！’”
